# Digital Zen - LLM Context

## Project Overview
Modern Angular project (v21+) - Chrome Extension for productivity and focus management.

## Tech Stack
- **Angular:** v21 (latest stable)
- **TypeScript:** v5.9 (strict mode)
- **Styling:** SCSS with BEM naming convention
- **State Management:** Angular Signals (primary), RxJS (for async streams)
- **Build:** Angular CLI with custom Chrome extension build pipeline

## Coding Guidelines

**Primary Source:** We follow [official Angular documentation](https://angular.dev/) for standard patterns.

**Project Guidelines:** See `/docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md` for complete reference.

**Quick Reference:**
- DZ_01-DZ_09, DZ_13-DZ_16: Follow official Angular docs (Standalone Components, Signals, Control Flow, etc.)
- DZ_10: UI Text Constants (project-specific)
- DZ_11: Universal Logger (project-specific)
- DZ_12: BEM with dz- prefix (project-specific)

## Key Angular Patterns

### Component Architecture
- **Standalone Components** - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/components/importing)
- `ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush` by default - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/best-practices/skipping-subtrees)
- Dependency injection via `inject()` function - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/api/core/inject)

### Reactivity
- **Signals** for local and shared state - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/signals)
- **RxJS** only for HTTP requests and complex async operations - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/rx)

### Template Syntax
- New control flow: `@if`, `@for`, `@switch`, `@defer` - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/templates/control-flow)
- No legacy directives: `*ngIf`, `*ngFor`, `*ngSwitch`

### Functional Patterns
- Functional interceptors (`HttpInterceptorFn`) - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/http/interceptors)
- Functional guards (`CanActivateFn`) - [Angular Docs](https://angular.dev/guide/routing/common-router-tasks#preventing-unauthorized-access)

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── app/              # Main app component
├── modules/          # Feature modules
│   ├── common/       # Shared components, services, utilities
│   │   ├── components/   # Reusable UI components
│   │   ├── constants/    # Application constants (UI_TEXT, etc.)
│   │   ├── enums/        # Enumerations
│   │   ├── services/     # Shared services
│   │   ├── models/       # TypeScript interfaces
│   │   └── validators/   # Form validators
│   ├── focus/        # Focus mode feature
│   ├── menu/         # Menu feature
│   └── auth/         # Authentication
├── background/       # Chrome extension background scripts
└── styles/           # Global styles
```

## UI Text Management

**All hardcoded text must be extracted to constants:**

**Guideline:** DZ_10 - See `/docs/CODING_GUIDELINES.md#dz_10-ui-text-constants`

Location: `src/modules/common/constants/ui-text.const.ts`

```typescript
export const UI_TEXT = Object.freeze({
  HEADER: {
    FOCUS_MENU_TITLE: 'Focus menu',
    // ...
  },
  PERIOD_FORM: {
    LABELS: { /* ... */ },
    PLACEHOLDERS: { /* ... */ },
    ERRORS: { /* ... */ },
  },
  // Organized by feature/component
});
```

**Component Usage:**
```typescript
export class ExampleComponent {
  protected readonly uiText = UI_TEXT;
}
```

**Template Usage:**
```html
<button [title]="uiText.HEADER.FOCUS_MENU_TITLE">...</button>
<input [placeholder]="uiText.PERIOD_FORM.PLACEHOLDERS.NAME" />
```

**Rules:**
- NO hardcoded strings in templates (labels, titles, placeholders, aria-labels, errors, buttons)
- All UI text MUST be in UI_TEXT constant
- Structure is i18n-ready (easy to replace with translation provider)
- Use property binding `[title]="uiText.X"` not attributes `title="text"`

## Coding Standards
- Use strict TypeScript (no `any` types)
- Prefer functional patterns over class-based
- Follow BEM naming: `dz-block__element--modifier`
- Private fields with `#` prefix
- Readonly for injected services

## Chrome Extension Specifics
- Manifest v3
- Background service workers
- OAuth integration for Google authentication
- Content security policies apply

## Quick Reference

**Create a component:**
```typescript
@Component({
  selector: 'dz-example',
  templateUrl: './example.html',
  styleUrls: ['./example.scss'],
  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
  imports: [CommonModule],
})
export class ExampleComponent {
  readonly #service = inject(SomeService);
  protected readonly data = signal<Data[]>([]);
}
```

**Template example:**
```html
@if (data().length > 0) {
  @for (item of data(); track item.id) {
    <div>{{ item.name }}</div>
  }
} @else {
  <p>No data available</p>
}
```

## Commands
- `npm start` - Development server
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm test` - Run tests
- `npm run lint` - Lint code
- `npm run format` - Format with Prettier
